name: Shapir Engineering and Industry Ltd
summary: Shapir Engineering and Industry Ltd engages in the infrastructure, concessions, quarry materials, real estate development and construction businesses in Israel. It constructs bridges, interchanges, commercial public projects, and apartment buildings, as well as undertakes road paving and marine works; and designs, constructs, maintains, and operates large-scale projects in cooperation with the private and public sectors. The company also manufactures quarry materials, ready-mix concrete and building finishing products, prefabricated elements from prestressed and precast concrete, and hot mix asphalt for paving roadways. In addition, it is involved in the development and construction of apartment buildings. The company was formerly known as Shapir Bareket Holdings Ltd. and changed its name to Shapir Engineering and Industry Ltd in September 2014. Shapir Engineering and Industry Ltd was founded in 1968 and is based in Petach Tikva, Israel.
